mapper.select: /** * SQL ID : com.study.work.admin.user.dao.UserDAO.selectCountUserId * SQL 명: 사용자 아이디 개수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
/** * SQL ID : com.study.work.admin.user.dao.UserDAO.getRoleList * SQL 명: 역할 목록 조회 */ SELECT ROLE_ID as roleId , ROLE_NAME as roleName FROM TB_ROLE

SELECT U.USER_SEQ AS userSeq, U.USER_ID AS userId, U.USER_NAME AS userName, U.EMAIL AS email, U.ROLE_ID AS roleId, R.ROLE_NAME AS roleName, U.CREATED_DTTM AS createdDttm, CASE WHEN U.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' THEN '활성' ELSE '비활성' END AS isActive FROM TB_USER U LEFT JOIN TB_ROLE R ON U.ROLE_ID = R.ROLE_ID
AND U.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchQuery}, '%')
AND U.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchQuery}, '%')
AND U.EMAIL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchQuery}, '%')
AND (U.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchQuery}, '%') OR U.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchQuery}, '%') OR U.EMAIL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchQuery}, '%'))
ORDER BY U.USER_SEQ ASC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_USER U LEFT JOIN TB_ROLE R ON U.ROLE_ID = R.ROLE_ID
AND U.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchQuery}, '%')
AND U.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchQuery}, '%')
AND U.EMAIL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchQuery}, '%')
AND (U.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchQuery}, '%') OR U.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchQuery}, '%') OR U.EMAIL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchQuery}, '%'))
